label: CCP Web RPC bridge
info: Bridges web-user/admin MQTT RPC (ccp/web/user/<uid>/request|response) to devices. Learns each device's encId from its retained status payload (which now carries id+mac), and publishes commands to AES(id), the learned encId=AES(id-MAC) and the plaintext id topic so legacy and re-flashed firmware both work. encId = AES-128-CBC(key/iv 'ClocktoCrypt1234', PKCS7, hex). Additive: does not touch other flows.

name: route request
func: const P=msg.topic.split('/');const uid=P[3],reqid=P[5];let r;try{r=JSON.parse(msg.payload);}catch(e){return null;}const dev=r.deviceId||'';const op=r.operation||'';const id=r.id||reqid;const K=Buffer.from('ClocktoCrypt1234');function aes(s){const c=crypto.createCipheriv('aes-128-cbc',K,K);c.setAutoPadding(true);return Buffer.concat([c.update(s,'utf8'),c.final()]).toString('hex');}const idx=flow.get('ccp_index')||{};const RT=`ccp/web/user/${uid}/response/${reqid}`;function reply(ok,data,err){return[null,{topic:RT,qos:1,payload:JSON.stringify({id:reqid,ok:ok,data:data||null,error:err||null})}];}if(op==='device.info'){const st=(flow.get('ccp_status')||{})[dev];return reply(true,Object.assign({device_id:dev},st||{online:false}));}if(op==='device.settings.get'){return reply(true,{config:{}});}const pend=flow.get('ccp_pending')||{};const now=Date.now();for(const k in pend){if(now-pend[k].ts>60000)delete pend[k];}let dm;if(op==='device.command'){dm={id:id,type:(r.payload&&r.payload.type)||'',params:(r.payload&&r.payload.params)||{}};}else if(op==='device.settings.put'){dm={id:id,type:'settings',params:{version:Math.floor(now/1000),config:(r.payload&&r.payload.config)||{}}};}else{return reply(false,null,'unsupported: '+op);}pend[id]={uid:uid,reqid:reqid,ts:now};flow.set('ccp_pending',pend);const payload=JSON.stringify(dm);const seen={};const out=[];[idx[dev],aes(dev),dev].forEach(function(t){if(t&&!seen[t]){seen[t]=1;out.push({topic:`ccp/v1/${t}/cmd`,qos:1,payload});}});return[out,null];

name: route response
func: let s;try{s=JSON.parse(msg.payload);}catch(e){return null;}const id=s.id;if(!id)return null;const pend=flow.get('ccp_pending')||{};const p=pend[id];if(!p)return null;delete pend[id];flow.set('ccp_pending',pend);return{topic:`ccp/web/user/${p.uid}/response/${p.reqid}`,qos:1,payload:JSON.stringify({id:p.reqid,ok:s.ok!==false,data:s,error:s.error||null})};

name: cache status + index
func: const P=msg.topic.split('/');const enc=P[2];let s;try{s=JSON.parse(msg.payload);}catch(x){return null;}const cache=flow.get('ccp_status')||{};const idx=flow.get('ccp_index')||{};cache[enc]=s;if(s&&s.id){cache[s.id]=s;idx[s.id]=enc;}flow.set('ccp_status',cache);flow.set('ccp_index',idx);return null;
